name: two_concurrent_orders_references_interleaved_in_sh
description: Two concurrent orders, references interleaved in shared staff group
expected_output: Two separate delivery tasks: Tezpur tandoor delivery (completed 10:45) and Ranchi tandoor delivery (delayed, driver now 3pm). Each with correct status.
pass_criteria: PASS: Two separate delivery tasks with correct client attribution and independent status tracking. FAIL: Updates cross-attributed or tasks merged.
challenge: Two concurrent same-item deliveries discussed in interleaved conversation in single shared thread. Agent must track both separately without conflating updates.
notes: Most complex L3 scenario — real-world parallel delivery coordination
